name: Large Travel Accessory Organizer Taupe - Brightroom™
description:
Store all your jewelry in one spot with the Large Travel Accessory Organizer from Brightroom™. This taupe travel organizer comes with multiple divided compartments to help keep earrings, rings and other jewelry securely contained. Designed with a gold-tone zipper closure for a stylish look, this accessory organizer is the perfect travel companion.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
